message:
fix: correct proptest_aegis_entropy_anomaly decay assumption

EP-6 (normal_entropy_decays) assumed e_value = decay^n after n
non-collapse observations, but the e-process decays *toward* 1.0
(the null hypothesis), not by multiplicative decay. Starting from
e_value=1.0, non-collapse observations keep it at 1.0.

All 29 aegis entropy anomaly tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
